plugins.photosPermission: PetHero lets you select and upload profile, pet, and listing photos from your photo library. We only access the photos you choose.
plugins.cameraPermission: PetHero uses the camera so you can take profile, pet, and listing photos to upload to your account.
plugins.microphonePermission: PetHero uses the microphone only when you record videos in the app.

plugins.photosPermission: PetHero lets you select and upload profile, pet, and listing photos from your photo library. We only access the photos you choose.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: PetHero saves photos to your library only when you choose to save an edited image.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: PetHero uses your location while the app is open to show nearby caregivers, start service check-ins, and autofill pickup or service addresses.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: PetHero uses your location during an active pet service to track the service route, support pickups and drop-offs, and share real-time trip progress even if the app is in the background.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: PetHero uses your location during an active pet service to track the service route, support pickups and drop-offs, and share real-time trip progress even if the app is in the background.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: PetHero uses the camera so you can take profile, pet, and listing photos to upload to your account.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: PetHero lets you select and upload profile, pet, and listing photos from your photo library. We only access the photos you choose.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: PetHero saves photos to your library only when you choose to save an edited image.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: PetHero uses your location while the app is open to show nearby caregivers, start service check-ins, and autofill pickup or service addresses.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: PetHero uses your location during an active pet service to track the service route, support pickups and drop-offs, and share real-time trip progress even if the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: PetHero uses your location during an active pet service to track the service route, support pickups and drop-offs, and share real-time trip progress even if the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: PetHero uses the microphone only when you record videos in the app.
